commands: set -- submissions/*Advanced_Day5*.ipynb; if [ "$1" = 'submissions/*Advanced_Day5*.ipynb' ]; then echo 'ERROR: No matching Day 5 notebook found'; exit 1; fi; if [ "$#" -ne 1 ]; then echo 'ERROR: Multiple matching Day 5 notebooks found'; exit 1; fi; jupyter nbconvert --to script "$1" --output day5 --output-dir .
if [ ! -f day5.py ]; then echo 'ERROR: Notebook conversion failed - day5.py not found'; exit 1; fi
